productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid Brown Wallets
description: Classic leather wallet from United Colours of Benetton in a rich brown colour.  There are enough internal compartments for all your essentials, and this wallet is just the right size to slip into your back pocket.Made of leather for strengthSeveral internal comartmentsSix card slots plus one clear id card slotCentre compartment with zipper for coinsCareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
